title: stellaria media
intro: Stellaria media, also known as common chickweed or starweed, is a type of herbaceous perennial plant that belongs to the carnation family and is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Stellaria media include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be made by drying the leaves and flowers of the plant and using them in various forms.
